goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'arrive by 16:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'kings lynn'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should arrive by 16:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to kings lynn
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
